notes: Visual polish. Post-flash splash is now a green ring scale-in + animated white checkmark + UPDATED label with version, replacing the old rotating gear. Settings menu (MENU) rows redesigned as iOS-style cards with primitive-drawn icons (sun / target / info / speech bubble / power glyph), the current value of each setting on the right (70% / TR / NORM / etc), and a chevron to advertise tap-to-enter. Reads as a settings list instead of a row of pills.
